text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Once again, happy birthday, Bamboo. Did you
enjoy the celebrations?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You betcha! I admit, I was caught pretty off guard
when you said we were gonna hold a birthday
cake-eating competition...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But that charged atmosphere was unbelievable!
My palms are still sweating!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And even though I ended up losing, I had so, so,
SO much fun!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad... It's your birthday, so I wanted you to
have as much fun as possible.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
Don't tell me... did you plan another competition
because I told you how much fun I had racing
you?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I also had fun back then... so I was really
happy to hear you say that.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My sincerest gratitude for such a grand
celebration! Not only was it tasty, but you gave
me the best gift of all—red-hot competition!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I was thinking... Wanna go for a post-meal
run to burn off those calories?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I don't mind... as long as you don't hold
back.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Right back at ya! This time, I won't lose!
